Join my team

Join our team and help make a difference here in Warrington South.

Even though we don’t have any open roles right now, I’m always keen to hear from young people who care about our community and want to learn more about how an MP’s office works. If you’re interested in future internships, placements or work-experience opportunities, you’re welcome to register your details. When a position becomes available, we’ll be in touch with those who’ve expressed interest.

Every day in an MP’s office is different, you’ll learn on your feet, meet local residents, and play a part in work that genuinely matters to people in Warrington South.

If you have any questions, you can get in touch with Rosie Leck from my team. rosie.leck@parliament.uk

Please be prepared to complete the  form in one sitting. There is no option to save and return later. 

Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.
- Step 1 of 7
Name *
An email address we can contact you on
Address *
Due to safeguarding requirements and workplace legislation please include your age
Proof of eligibility will be required if you are successful. For example you are a British Citizen
Education History *
Starting with the most recent, please give details of your education: School/College/University/Provider: Dates: Qualifications: If you are yet to sit exams please include your current school.
Name, organisation, relationship to you, school telephone number and email

Parliament Constituency Office Address: The Office of Sarah Hall MP, The Old Coroner's Court, Warrington Town Hall, Sankey Street, WA1 1UH
Labour Party Political - Promoted by Martin McManus on behalf of Sarah Hall
both at Labour North West at Rutherford House, Floor 2, Suite 6B Warrington Road, Birchwood, WA3 6ZH
team@sarahhall.co.uk
